promptDef.name: search-models-used-in-components-and-ui-states
promptDef.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

summary.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

input.cypher:
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(compDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(compImport:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model:ClassDeclaration)

MATCH (svc:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(svcDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(svcId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (svcId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(svcImport:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (svc)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model)

WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT comp.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT svc.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(compDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(compImport:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, comp.filePath
LIMIT 10

MATCH (svc:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(svcDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(svcId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (svcId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(svcImport:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
RETURN DISTINCT svc.name, svc.filePath
LIMIT 10

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(compDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(compImport:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT comp.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 20

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(compDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(compImport:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(dep:Identifier)
RETURN comp.name, COLLECT(DISTINCT dep.text) as identifiers
LIMIT 5

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamsPageComponent'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(node)
RETURN DISTINCT node.text, labels(node)
LIMIT 20

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamsPageComponent'})-[rel]->(target)
RETURN type(rel) as relationshipType, target.name as targetName, target.id
LIMIT 20

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamsPageComponent'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier)
WHERE id.text IS NOT NULL
RETURN DISTINCT id.text
LIMIT 30

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamCacheUiState'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier)
WHERE id.text IS NOT NULL
RETURN DISTINCT id.text
LIMIT 50

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id1:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (id1)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id2:Identifier {text: 'State'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND NOT comp.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT state.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name

RETURN DISTINCT ref1.text as modelName, ref1.id as modelId
LIMIT 50

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE comp.filePath CONTAINS model.name
OR comp.filePath CONTAINS model.id
RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 10

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)
MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier)

WHERE stateRef.text = model.name
AND compRef.text = model.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND model.name != comp.name
AND model.name != state.name

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND (model.name = 'Team' OR model.name = 'TeamFilterModel')
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 30

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

WITH COLLECT({comp: comp.name, ref: compRef.text}) as compRefs

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE state.name IN ['TeamCacheUiState', 'TeamListUiState', 'TeamSubjectUiState', 'AnalyticsState']
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier)

WITH compRefs, COLLECT({state: state.name, ref: stateRef.text}) as stateRefs

RETURN compRefs, stateRefs
LIMIT 1

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamCacheUiState'})

MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref:Identifier)
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref)

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, state.name, ref.text as sharedIdentifier

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamCacheUiState'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name
AND ref1.text != 'Component'
AND ref1.text != 'Injectable'

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, state.name, ref1.text

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamCacheUiState'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: ref1.text})

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: 'Team'})
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE state.name IN ['TeamCacheUiState', 'TeamListUiState', 'TeamSubjectUiState', 'AnalyticsState']
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text IN ['TeamEntity', 'MemberEntity', 'CreateTeamDto', 'UpdateTeamDto', 'MemberInputDto']

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, state.name, ref1.text

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text IN ['TeamEntity', 'MemberEntity', 'CreateTeamDto', 'UpdateTeamDto', 'MemberInputDto', 'Team', 'Member']

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, state.name, ref1.text

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: ref1.text})

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name

RETURN DISTINCT ref1.text as sharedIdentifier
LIMIT 50

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: ref1.text})

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND (model.filePath CONTAINS 'model' OR model.filePath CONTAINS 'dto' OR model.filePath CONTAINS 'entity' OR model.filePath CONTAINS 'state')
RETURN model.name, model.filePath
ORDER BY model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND (model.filePath CONTAINS 'model' OR model.filePath CONTAINS 'dto' OR model.filePath CONTAINS 'entity')
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text IN ['MemberEntity', 'TeamEntity', 'MemberInputDto', 'CreateTeamDto', 'UpdateTeamDto']

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, state.name, ref1.text

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamListUiState'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref:Identifier)
RETURN DISTINCT ref.text
LIMIT 50

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamListUiState'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text IN ['TeamFilterModel', 'TeamActionModel']

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, state.name, ref1.text

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamFilterModel'})
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: ref1.text})

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (stateId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != state.name

RETURN DISTINCT ref1.text as sharedName
LIMIT 100

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE model.name IN ['signal', 'inject', 'team', 'Team', 'city', 'getTeams', 'name', 'subscribe', 'id', 'body', 'delete']
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE model.name IN ['signal', 'inject', 'team', 'Team', 'city', 'getTeams', 'name', 'subscribe', 'id', 'body']
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE service.name IN ['TeamsService', 'AuditLogService', 'ConfigService', 'AnalyticsService', 'AnalyticsState', 'TeamCacheUiState', 'TeamListUiState', 'TeamSubjectUiState']
MATCH (service)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: ref1.text})

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != service.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.controller'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.entity'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.dto'
RETURN model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 20

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(srvRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})

WHERE compRef.text = srvRef.text
AND model.name = compRef.text
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.controller'
AND model.name != comp.name
AND model.name != service.name

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(srvRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})
WHERE NOT (model)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:Identifier {text: 'Component'})

WHERE compRef.text = srvRef.text
AND model.name = compRef.text
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.controller'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state'
AND model.name != comp.name
AND model.name != service.name

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(srvRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})

WHERE compRef.text = srvRef.text
AND model.name = compRef.text
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.controller'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state'
AND model.name != comp.name
AND model.name != service.name

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.name IN ['AnalyticsState', 'TeamCacheUiState', 'TeamListUiState', 'TeamSubjectUiState', 'MemberSelection']
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})

WHERE compRef.text = stateRef.text
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND model.name != comp.name
AND model.name != uiState.name

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier {text: 'MemberSelection'})

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.name IN ['AnalyticsState', 'TeamCacheUiState', 'TeamListUiState', 'TeamSubjectUiState', 'MemberSelection']
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier {text: 'MemberSelection'})

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, uiState.name

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamsPageComponent'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamListUiState'})
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref)

RETURN DISTINCT ref.text as sharedIdentifier

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamsPageComponent'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration {name: 'TeamListUiState'})
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text

RETURN DISTINCT ref1.text as sharedIdentifier
LIMIT 30

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state' OR uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text

RETURN DISTINCT ref1.text as identifier
LIMIT 50

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE model.name IN ['signal', 'selectedTeam', 'pendingAction', 'inject', 'TeamFilterModel', 'team', 'Team']
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state' OR uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.state'

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT (model)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(:Decorator)

MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier {text: model.name})
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier {text: model.name})

WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state' OR uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

MATCH (sharedModel:ClassDeclaration {name: ref1.text})

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND sharedModel.name != comp.name
AND sharedModel.name != uiState.name
AND NOT sharedModel.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT sharedModel.name, sharedModel.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state' OR uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})
WHERE model.name IN ['MemberSelection', 'ButtonComponent', 'AlertDirective', 'DisabledDirective', 'AppController', 'TeamsController']

WHERE compRef.text = stateRef.text
AND model.name = compRef.text
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state' OR uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(stateRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})
WHERE model.filePath CONTAINS 'api/'

WHERE compRef.text = stateRef.text
AND model.name = compRef.text

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE model.filePath CONTAINS 'web/'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.component'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.service'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.module'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.directive'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state'
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
RETURN model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier {text: 'MemberSelection'})

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS 'ui-state' OR uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.state'
MATCH (uiState)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier {text: 'MemberSelection'})

RETURN DISTINCT comp.name, uiState.name

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compRef:Identifier)

MATCH (svc:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(svcId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (svcId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (svc)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(svcRef:Identifier)

MATCH (model:ClassDeclaration {name: compRef.text})

WHERE compRef.text = svcRef.text
AND model.name = compRef.text
AND model.name != comp.name
AND model.name != svc.name
AND NOT model.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'

RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i1:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref1:Identifier)

MATCH (svc:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(svcId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (svcId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(i2:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (svc)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ref2:Identifier)

WHERE ref1.text = ref2.text
AND ref1.text != comp.name
AND ref1.text != svc.name

RETURN DISTINCT ref1.text
LIMIT 100
